items.title: Definitely deserves 5 stars
items.summary: I love this game although I’m only like 2 weeks in? I’m not one for reviews but I wanted to leave some feedback since it’s still in beta. Other than a few quality of life changes for example when trying to look at a characters card info and what they do there should be something like where if you tap the card it comes up on the screen so you can read it with ease and then a little button in the top to X off, I personally struggle to read what the cards do most times also does the game have a pity? I’m not sure but if not then that’s necessary for any solid game with gacha. Just little things like that is all the critique I have for this game overall I love it 5/5
items.author: voidstudios404
